SEARCH
Package io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli

Class CLIController

java.lang.Object
io.squid.cybreathe.controller.cli.CLIController
public class CLIController extends Object
Controller mediating simulation data model updates specifically for the CommandLineInterface view. Isolates CLI tick operations and cell management, bypassing JavaFX dependencies.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CLIController(Simulation abstraction)
    Constructs a CLIController with the given simulation abstraction.

  • Constructor Details

    • CLIController

      public CLIController(Simulation abstraction)
      Constructs a CLIController with the given simulation abstraction.
      Parameters:
      abstraction - the simulation abstraction to be controlled

  • Method Details

    • getAbstraction

      public Simulation getAbstraction()
      Gets the simulation abstraction model.
      Returns:
      the current simulation model

    • initGrid

      public void initGrid(int w, int h)
      Initializes the simulation model grid with clean AIR cells.
      Parameters:
      w - the width of the grid
      h - the height of the grid

    • tick

      public void tick(int count)
      Runs simulation execution loop for a specific tick count.
      Parameters:
      count - the number of ticks to run the simulation

    • setCell

      public void setCell(int x, int y, String typeName, double pollution, double customRate)
      Replaces the cell at (x, y) with a new subclass representing the target type.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      typeName - the type of the cell (e.g., "AIR", "VEGETATION", "FACTORY", "BUILDING")
      pollution - the initial pollution level of the cell
      customRate - the custom rate for absorption or production for the cell

    • massSpawn

      public void massSpawn(String typeName, double percentage)
      Randomly spawns a percentage of cells of a target type across active clean air tiles.
      Parameters:
      typeName - the type of cells to spawn (e.g., "VEGETATION", "FACTORY", "BUILDING")
      percentage - the percentage of clean air cells to replace (between 0.0 and 1.0)

    • saveSimulation

      public void saveSimulation(File file) throws IOException
      Saves the current simulation state to a file.
      Parameters:
      file - the target file where the simulation will be saved
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during saving

    • loadSimulation

      public void loadSimulation(File file) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
      Loads a simulation state from a file.
      Parameters:
      file - the file from which the simulation will be loaded
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs during loading
      ClassNotFoundException - if the class of a serialized object cannot be found

    • getTickCount

      public int getTickCount()
      Gets the current tick count of the simulation.
      Returns:
      the number of elapsed simulation ticks

    • getGridWidth

      public int getGridWidth()
      Gets the width of the simulation grid.
      Returns:
      the grid width

    • getGridHeight

      public int getGridHeight()
      Gets the height of the simulation grid.
      Returns:
      the grid height

    • getCellConsoleChar

      public char getCellConsoleChar(int x, int y)
      Gets a character representation of the cell type at (x, y) for console display.
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      Returns:
      a char representation: 'A' for Air, 'V' for Vegetation, 'F' for Factory, 'B' for Building, or ' ' if null/unknown

    • getCellPollutionLevel

      public double getCellPollutionLevel(int x, int y)
      Gets the pollution level of the cell at (x, y).
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      Returns:
      the pollution level of the cell, or 0.0 if the cell does not exist

    • getCellName

      public String getCellName(int x, int y)
      Gets the type name of the cell at (x, y).
      Parameters:
      x - the x-coordinate of the cell
      y - the y-coordinate of the cell
      Returns:
      the name of the cell type, or an empty string if the cell does not exist

    • getDiffusionRate

      public double getDiffusionRate()
      Gets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
      Returns:
      the diffusion rate

    • setDiffusionRate

      public void setDiffusionRate(double rate)
      Sets the global diffusion rate for pollution.
      Parameters:
      rate - the new diffusion rate to set

    • getAbsorptionRate

      public double getAbsorptionRate()
      Gets the global absorption rate for pollution.
      Returns:
      the absorption rate

    • setAbsorptionRate

      public void setAbsorptionRate(double rate)
      Sets the global absorption rate for pollution.
      Parameters:
      rate - the new absorption rate to set

    • getWindDirection

      public WindDirection getWindDirection()
      Gets the current wind direction of the simulation.
      Returns:
      the wind direction

    • setWindDirection

      public void setWindDirection(WindDirection direction)
      Sets the wind direction of the simulation.
      Parameters:
      direction - the new wind direction

    • getWindStrength

      public double getWindStrength()
      Gets the wind strength of the simulation.
      Returns:
      the wind strength

    • setWindStrength

      public void setWindStrength(double strength)
      Sets the wind strength of the simulation.
      Parameters:
      strength - the new wind strength

    • getCellTypeCounts

      public Map<String,Integer> getCellTypeCounts()
      Gets the counts of each cell type present in the grid.
      Returns:
      a map mapping cell type names to their counts

    • getCellTypePercentages

      public Map<String,Double> getCellTypePercentages()
      Gets the percentage distributions of each cell type present in the grid.
      Returns:
      a map mapping cell type names to their percentages
